content: Backend: crear mlb_pregame_analytics_v3.py (Game Script Engine + Why-This-Pick + Confidence Breakdown + Baseball Reasons + Market Diversifier)
Wire v3 en mlb_day_orchestrator.py — adjuntar _mlb_script_v3 a cada pick y aplicar diversificación a nivel de día
Frontend: crear MLBScriptV3Panel.jsx (Expected Script, Pitchers card, Why This Pick checklist, Confidence Breakdown)
Frontend: integrar V3 Panel en MatchCard.jsx + reemplazar reasoning genérico cuando existan baseball_reasons
Probar end-to-end via /api/mlb/day + screenshot del dashboard MLB
Testing agent (backend MLB-V7) — validar payload, diversificación y no-regresión football/basketball
